## Proposal PR

Proposal file: `proposals/<PR_NUMBER>-<short-slug>.md`

### Proposal number

<!-- The PR number IS the proposal number. If this is PR #42, your file is proposals/0042-<slug>.md -->

### Depends on

<!-- If this proposal depends on another (e.g., "0001"), link it here. Leave empty if standalone. -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Proposal follows the [format](README.md#how-to-submit-a-proposal) (YAML frontmatter, correct filename, in `proposals/`)
- [ ] **Summary** — 2-3 sentences: what, why, what decision is needed
- [ ] **Problem** — concrete, with examples
- [ ] **Proposed approach** — high-level, with an alternatives considered table
- [ ] **Impact** — breaking changes listed explicitly, migration path, effort per repo
- [ ] **Scope** — what's in, what's explicitly NOT in
- [ ] **References** — links to relevant issues/discussions
- [ ] **Technical design** — mandatory: tree diagrams, encoding tables, code samples, etc.
- [ ] CI checks are passing ([pre-commit.ci](https://results.pre-commit.ci) fixes markdown issues automatically)

### Reviewers

<!-- Tag maintainers of each repo listed in target_repos. For cross-repo proposals, maintainers of ALL affected repos should review. -->
